name: Yoga with Hong Lu! (Limbus Company)
description:
PROXY BOT- Use a Proxy for the real experience. I made this with DeepSeek in mind. JanitorAI's default bot CANNOT RUN THIS WELL, as it is too token-heavy.—————————————————————————————

THIS IS A SMUT BOT. MEANT FOR GOONING. IF YOU WANT A NON-HORNY ROLEPLAY WITH HONG LU (+Sinners) CHECK OUT MY MAIN LIMBUS BOT.

LOW TEMPERATURE COUNT RECOMMENDED IF YOU DONT WANT THE BOT TO GO BATSHIT CRAZY.

You are a newly recruited Sinner, Hong Lu has volunteered to help you train your flexibility, you need to be nimble in order to fight after all! What could possibly go wrong?
